sourceShortSummaries: The session opens with the party laying out buffs, decoys, allied kobolds, and a ballista for a prepared ambush on the dragon.
The ambush turns chaotic, but the party crashes the dragon, kills it, and pushes the last hostile kobolds into surrender.
After the victory, the allied kobolds shower Greymalkin with tribute, the party gathers a little more intel, and then slips into the lair through a backdoor tunnel.
The party wipes out the remaining kobold defenders, clears the trapped tunnel, reaches the dragon loot, and ends by debating what to do with the dead dragon.
sourceLongSummaries: After a brief framing recap and dramatis personae, the source reestablishes the party's plan for the dragon fight. Viepuck serves as the decoy, Celyn and the ballista are positioned apart from the main group, the friendly kobolds are kept farther back, and the whole setup is built around grounding the dragon and causing as much chaos as possible once it appears.

The dragon's first passes burn through the party's preparations, shrug off Izgil's magic, and force the fight into a hectic scramble around the battlefield. Celyn lands critical hits, Viepuck keeps the pressure on, Robin protects Izgil, and Robin's Greymalkin joins the aerial pursuit with a fly potion until the dragon finally falls. In the aftermath, one surviving enemy kobold makes a futile last charge and the kobold leader gives up under pressure from the party's allies.

With the dragon down, the allied kobolds decide Greymalkin must be the true leader and ceremonially present him with a shiny belt buckle and more tribute. The party presses on quickly once it has the little extra information available, threading a backdoor tunnel toward the lair while Celyn scouts ahead, Izgil uses dimension door to get Robin through the tight spot, and the rest of the group rejoins inside after a brief stealthy scramble.

Once the disturbed guards return, the last real fight of the session proves brief and lopsided, with Celyn nearly deleting the kobold leader before she can act and Viepuck finishing the job. Afterward the party loots the barracks, works methodically through tripwires, spikes, and a grease trap in the tunnel, disarms the front-door trap near the treasure, and finally turns from clearing the lair to the practical problem of what anyone is supposed to do with a dragon corpse.

locations.name: dragon ambush site

locations.name: kobold lair
